description: Cross-AZ data transfer cost jumps because a Kafka consumer group was moved to a different subnet but producers kept publishing to the original AZ's brokers.

root_cause.summary: Kafka consumers relocated to us-east-1c but MSK brokers are in us-east-1a. Every consumed message crosses an AZ boundary; cross-AZ data transfer is $0.01/GB each way.
root_cause.remediation: Move consumers back to the broker's AZ, or use MSK rack-awareness + client-side fetch.from.closest.
